body: This PR updates the 2-moment microphysics scheme to working fluid changes (i.e. precipitation is also part of the working fluid). Requires `CloudMicrophysics` version 0.25
title: Update 2M scheme to working fluid (CM v0.25)

body:
## Purpose 
This PR refactors the `AtmosModel` struct by grouping related parameters into logical sub-structs. The new struct has a simple keyword based constructor and maintains backward compatibility with AtmosModel property access. This PR should leave behavior unchanged.

## Key Benefits:
- This PR simplifies type complexity and improves extensibility of AtmosModel while maintaining existing property access
- User interface improvements: Users can now construct an AtmosModel without an AtmosConfig. Users can also create convenience constructors for common model types: `DryAtmosModel(), EquilMoistAtmosModel()` etc
- Future work: This is a first step towards a composable Julia-only interface for atmos.

Closes #3385, addresses #2063 but it could use some more discussion before closing.


## Content
- **Structural reorganization**: Replaced the monolithic AtmosModel with 33 type parameters with a grouped structure containing 11 logical sub-components (hydrology, forcing, radiation, advection, turbconv, gravity_wave, hyperdiff, vert_diff, sponge, surface, numerics). This largely matches the structure in #3385, I have a similar hierarchical tree diagram below.
- **Backward compatibility**: Implemented property forwarding using `@generated` functions so existing property access like atmos.moisture_model still works.
- **Constructor improvements**: Added unified flat interface constructor that accepts sub-models at the top level and organizes them internally. Also added sample keyword based convenience constructors such as `DryAtmosModel` and `EquilMoistAtmosModel`
- Extended default diagnostics to support the new AtmosModel struct
- Added tests for AtmosModel

New AtmosModel structure with possible types/arguments for each field:
```
AtmosModel
├── hydrology::AtmosWater
│   ├── moisture_model = nothing
│   │   ├── DryModel()
│   │   ├── EquilMoistModel()
│   │   └── NonEquilMoistModel()
│   ├── precip_model = nothing
│   │   ├── NoPrecipitation()
│   │   ├── Microphysics0Moment()
│   │   ├── Microphysics1Moment()
│   │   └── Microphysics2Moment()
│   ├── cloud_model = nothing
│   │   ├── GridScaleCloud()
│   │   ├── QuadratureCloud(sgs_quad)
│   │   └── SGSQuadratureCloud(sgs_quad)
│   ├── noneq_cloud_formation_mode = nothing
│   │   ├── Explicit()
│   │   └── Implicit()
│   └── call_cloud_diagnostics_per_stage = nothing
├── scm_setup::SCMSetup
│   ├── subsidence = nothing
│   │   └── Subsidence(profile)
│   ├── external_forcing = nothing
│   │   ├── GCMForcing(file, cfsite_number)
│   │   ├── ExternalDrivenTVForcing(file)
│   │   └── ISDACForcing()
│   ├── ls_adv = nothing
│   │   └── LargeScaleAdvection(...)
│   ├── advection_test = nothing  # Bool
│   └── scm_coriolis = nothing
│       └── SCMCoriolis(...)
├── radiation::AtmosRadiation
│   ├── radiation_mode = nothing
│   │   ├── RRTMGPI.ClearSkyRadiation()
│   │   ├── RRTMGPI.AllSkyRadiation()
│   │   └── RRTMGPI.AllSkyRadiationWithClearSkyDiagnostics()
│   ├── ozone = nothing
│   │   ├── IdealizedOzone()
│   │   └── PrescribedOzone()
│   ├── co2 = nothing
│   │   ├── FixedCO2()
│   │   └── MaunaLoaCO2()
│   ├── insolation = nothing
│   │   ├── IdealizedInsolation()
│   │   ├── TimeVaryingInsolation(start_date)
│   │   ├── RCEMIPIIInsolation()
│   │   ├── GCMDrivenInsolation()
│   │   └── ExternalTVInsolation()
│   └── held_suarez_forcing = nothing
│       ├── HeldSuarezForcing()
│       ├── RadiationDYCOMS()
│       ├── RadiationISDAC()
│       └── RadiationTRMM_LBA(FT)
├── turbconv::AtmosTurbconv
│   ├── edmfx_model = nothing
│   │   └── EDMFXModel()
│   ├── turbconv_model = nothing
│   │   ├── PrognosticEDMFX{N, use_tke}(a_half)
│   │   ├── DiagnosticEDMFX{N, use_tke}(a_half)
│   │   └── EDOnlyEDMFX()
│   ├── sgs_*_mode = nothing  # adv, entr_detr, nh_pressure, mf
│   │   ├── Explicit()
│   │   └── Implicit()
│   └── smagorinsky_lilly = nothing
│       └── SmagorinskyLilly()
├── gravity_wave::AtmosGravityWave
│   ├── non_orographic_gravity_wave = nothing
│   │   └── NonOrographicGravityWave()
│   └── orographic_gravity_wave = nothing
│       └── OrographicGravityWave()
├── sponge::AtmosSponge
│   ├── viscous_sponge = nothing
│   │   └── ViscousSponge()
│   └── rayleigh_sponge = nothing
│       └── RayleighSponge()
├── surface::AtmosSurface
│   ├── sfc_temperature = nothing
│   │   ├── ZonallySymmetricSST()
│   │   ├── ZonallyAsymmetricSST()
│   │   ├── RCEMIPIISST()
│   │   └── ExternalTVColumnSST()
│   ├── surface_model = nothing
│   │   ├── PrescribedSurfaceTemperature()
│   │   └── PrognosticSurfaceTemperature()
│   └── surface_albedo = nothing
│       ├── ConstantAlbedo(value)
│       ├── RegressionFunctionAlbedo(...)
│       └── CouplerAlbedo()
├── numerics::AtmosNumerics
│   ├── *_upwinding  # energy, tracer, edmfx, edmfx_sgsflux
│   │   ├── Val(:first_order)
│   │   ├── Val(:third_order)
│   │   ├── Val(:vanleer_limiter)
│   │   └── Val(:none)  # sgsflux only
│   ├── test_dycore_consistency = nothing
│   │   └── TestDycoreConsistency()
│   ├── limiter = nothing
│   │   └── QuasiMonotoneLimiter()
│   └── diff_mode = nothing
│       ├── Explicit()
│       └── Implicit()
├── hyperdiff = nothing
│   └── ClimaHyperdiffusion()
├── vert_diff = nothing
│   ├── VerticalDiffusion()
│   └── DecayWithHeightDiffusion()
└── disable_surface_flux_tendency::Bool = false
```

## To-do
- rename: vert_diff -> vertical_diffusion, PrognosticSurfaceTemperature -> SlabOceanSST, precip_model -> microphysics_model
- Move hyperdiff into numerics
- Make `summary(::AtmosModel)` nicer now that the model is not flat

## Future work

- Add proper `AtmosSimulation` constructor
- Sketch out future UI capability: 
    - Add sensible defaults so that calling `AtmosModel()` is useful
    - Add more convenience constructors for a composable model: `AtmosModel() |> with_moist_physics(options...)`. I
title: Refactor AtmosModel
